title: T-Deck: update board DTS, pinctrl, Kconfig for keyboard, trackball, I2C, display enable
description: Extend t_deck_esp32s3_procpu.dts and pinctrl.dtsi to include I2C buses for keyboard (addr 0x55) and trackball, enable display node, add input nodes. Update Kconfig and defconfig. Follow existing patterns from heltec and t_echo boards. Include test vectors if applicable.
